requirement_topic.en: China GB/T 18487 Baseline versus Turkey Market-Access Package
requirement_topic.zh: 中国GB/T 18487基线与土耳其市场准入资料包
requirement_topic.zht: 中國GB/T 18487基線與土耳其市場准入資料包

summary.en: Turkey-market readiness should be assessed as a combined product, connector, service-operation, and site package: CE technical documentation, IEC / TS EN IEC safety and EMC evidence, Type 2 or CCS2 interface as specified, EPDK charging-service obligations for public operation, TEDAS or distribution-company project approval where applicable, OCPP backend acceptance, Turkish labels and manuals, and local maintenance responsibility.
summary.zh: 土耳其市场准备状态应作为产品、接口、服务运营和现场资料包综合评估：CE技术文件、IEC / TS EN IEC安全与EMC证据、按要求配置Type 2或CCS2接口、公共运营时的EPDK充电服务义务、适用时的TEDAŞ或配电公司项目审批、OCPP后台验收、土耳其语标签和手册以及本地维护责任。
summary.zht: 土耳其市場準備狀態應作為產品、接口、服務營運和現場資料包綜合評估：CE技術文件、IEC / TS EN IEC安全與EMC證據、按要求配置Type 2或CCS2接口、公共營運時的EPDK充電服務義務、適用時的TEDAŞ或配電公司項目審批、OCPP後台驗收、土耳其語標籤和手冊以及本地維護責任。

standards_or_laws: CE technical file and declaration route
TEDAS project approval and local distribution-company connection route

summary.en: GB-standard cn_common_equivalent: The China baseline normally starts with GB/T 18487.1 for general conductive charging system requirements, GB/T 20234 for connection devices, GB/T 27930 for DC charger-to-BMS communication, and China domestic certification documents where required. This is useful for a gap matrix but should be treated as source material for Turkey conversion, not as a direct Turkey approval.
summary.zh: GB标准中国常见对应：中国基线通常从GB/T 18487.1传导充电系统通用要求、GB/T 20234连接装置、GB/T 27930直流充电机与BMS通信，以及适用时的中国国内认证文件开始。这些资料适合用于差距矩阵，但应作为土耳其转换的源材料，而不是直接的土耳其批准。
summary.zht: GB標準中國常見對應：中國基線通常從GB/T 18487.1傳導充電系統通用要求、GB/T 20234連接裝置、GB/T 27930直流充電機與BMS通訊，以及適用時的中國國內認證文件開始。這些資料適合用於差距矩陣，但應作為土耳其轉換的源材料，而不是直接的土耳其批准。

standards_or_laws: China domestic charger certification route where applicable

gap.en: A defensible Turkey conversion file should include a clause-by-clause GB/T-to-IEC map, connector redesign record, CE directive applicability matrix, test-report equivalence review, Turkish manual and label pack, EPDK and site-operation responsibility matrix, TEDAS or distribution-company grid documents, OCPP acceptance report, and residual open-items list.
gap.zh: 可辩护的土耳其转换文件应包括GB/T到IEC逐条映射、接口重新设计记录、CE法规适用性矩阵、测试报告等效性审查、土耳其语手册和标签包、EPDK及现场运营责任矩阵、TEDAŞ或配电公司电网文件、OCPP验收报告以及剩余待确认事项清单。
gap.zht: 可辯護的土耳其轉換文件應包括GB/T到IEC逐條映射、接口重新設計記錄、CE法規適用性矩陣、測試報告等效性審查、土耳其語手冊和標籤包、EPDK及現場營運責任矩陣、TEDAŞ或配電公司電網文件、OCPP驗收報告以及剩餘待確認事項清單。

mandatory_status.target: Mixed: CE and electrical safety / EMC obligations are mandatory where in scope; EPDK licensing is mandatory for regulated public charging service operation; connector and OCPP requirements may be mandatory by project, operator, tender, or fleet specification
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T baseline and domestic certification documents are not direct substitutes for Turkey CE, EPDK, TSE, TEDAS, or operator acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use the China GB/T 18487 package as the starting evidence set, then build a Turkey-specific CE, connector, EPDK, TEDAS, OCPP, EMC, RCD, label, and site-commissioning package before claiming readiness.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 可将中国GB/T 18487资料包作为起始证据集，但在宣称准备就绪前，应建立土耳其专用的CE、接口、EPDK、TEDAŞ、OCPP、EMC、RCD、标签和现场调试资料包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 可將中國GB/T 18487資料包作為起始證據集，但在宣稱準備就緒前，應建立土耳其專用的CE、接口、EPDK、TEDAŞ、OCPP、EMC、RCD、標籤和現場調試資料包。
